subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath revealed the verses, which are clear evidences from God unto them that believe and turn unto the Dayspring of His Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الایات و انها بینات من لدی الله لمن آمن و اقبل الی مطلع امره
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Word of God and human limitations, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital
